description: Full-featured rich text editor with a comprehensive toolbar supporting headings (H1-H4), text formatting (bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, subscript, superscript), lists (ordered, unordered, task), indentation, links, images, tables, videos, code blocks, blockquotes, horizontal rules, text/highlight colors, emojis, find & replace, @mentions, and {{token}} variable insertion. Provides word count and character limit tracking.

examples.title: Basic rich editor with two-way binding
Editor with mentions and tokens
examples.code:
<TmRichEditorFull @bind-Value="_content"
                  SupportsMentions="true"
                  MentionProvider="@mentionProvider"
                  SupportsTokens="true"
                  TokenProvider="@tokenProvider"
                  OnTokenCreateRequested="HandleCreateToken"
                  OnTokenInserted="HandleTokenInserted"
                  MaxLength="5000"
                  ShowWordCount="true" />
